data_availability.note: This workbook contains one (sometimes two on day 0) export datapoint per culture-day per bioreactor; no continuous 1‑minute process logger is embedded in these sheets.

daily_report.structure: Checklist matrix by culture day + event log

H03.ph_short_term: day 2&3 pH 6,67 and after 6,57 for 8h; day 9&10 pH 7,3 and after 7,4 for 8h

H11.ph_short_term: day 2&3 pH 6,67 and after 6,57 for 8h; day 9&10 pH 7,3 and after 7,4 for 8h

checklist_matrix.label: Alarm switch on/ LH running mode

event_log.comment: All Bioreactors add 2ppm AF.
H03, H11 set pH to 6,67+/-0,03 after pH is stability take Flex2 pH sample.
H03, H11 set pH to 6,57+/-0,03. 11:05 change CO2 kp. H03 up to 30. H11 up to 50.
H03, H11, Set pH to 7,00 +-0,2; 18:00 Add 2ppm Antifoam H01-H12
H03, H11 set pH to 6,67+/-0,03 after pH is stability take Flex2 pH sample.
H03, H11 set pH to 6,57+/-0,03. 11:05 change CO2 kp. H03 up to 50. H11 up to 50.
H03, H11, Set pH to 7,00 +-0,2; 18:00 start  Antifoam intervall, adding 2ppm every 24 h for H01-H12; 20:00 Start Automated Antifoam 2ppm for H01-H12
Take 10,3ml manual Sample from H12 for Flex 2 Messure according Dattenböck
change  Antifoam intervall, adding 2ppm every 12 h for H11-H12
Tempshift to 35°C H01-H12
Change  Glucose target to 4,5 g/l for H02,H05,H07,H08,H12; 09.00 change Antifoam intervall to add 2ppm every 8h for H01-H12
Set pH to 7,3 +-0,03 for H03; 08:15 Set pH setpoint to 7,3 +-0,03 for H11; 09.00 change Antifoam intervall to add 2ppm every 6h for H01-H12
Set pH to 7,4 +-003 for H03,H11; 19:30 Set pH to 7,2 +-0,2 for H03, H11
Flex 2 repeat mesurement because of GLn issues Data used from repeat meassurment; 11:30 Set pH to 7,3 +-0,03 for H03, H11;
13:00 change Antifoam intervall to add 2ppm every 4h for H01-H12; 1300 Set pH to 7,4 +-003 for H03,H11; 21:00 Set pH to 7,2 +-0,2 for H03, H11
Changed Antifoam intervall to 2ppm every 2h for H01-H12, add 2ppm Antifoam bolus to all BR, changed autom. pipetted antifoam to 10 tips and max Vol. 1,2mL
Changed Antifoam intervall to 2ppm every 3h for H01-H12
Changed Antifoam intervall to 2ppm every 2h for H01-H12, add 3ppm Antifoam bolus to H02
becaue of Daylight saving time Flex 2 messurment Dataexporttime an reported Time -1h delay
H02 additional Antifoam intervall 1ppm every 2h.
Fermentation finished fermenter transfered to Downstream for Harvest

18:00 Add 2ppm Antifoam

12:00 change  Antifoam intervall, adding 2ppm every 12 h

09.00 change Antifoam intervall to add 2ppm every 8h
09.00 change Antifoam intervall to add 2ppm every 6h
13:00 change Antifoam intervall to add 2ppm every 4h
